nodes.name: Trigger on New Transcript

parameters.query: SELECT transcript_id, title, raw_content, duration_seconds FROM raw_transcripts WHERE processed = FALSE ORDER BY ingested_at ASC LIMIT 1;

nodes.notes: Poll for unprocessed transcripts. In production, trigger via webhook after PLAUD pipeline stores transcript.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO extraction_run (transcript_id, model, prompt_version, status) VALUES ($1, 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'v1.0', 'running') RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Call Claude API

parameter.name: JSON

nodes.notes: Claude extracts structured items from transcript into register format. Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 for cost efficiency.

nodes.name: Write Gate Log Entries

parameters.query:
-- For each extracted item, insert into confidence_gate_log as PROPOSED
-- This is a placeholder — in production, use a Function node to loop over
-- the parsed JSON and insert one row per extracted item.
INSERT INTO confidence_gate_log (register_name, proposed_data, confidence_score, confidence_label, status, source_transcript_id, extraction_model) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb, $3, $4, 'PROPOSED', $5, 'claude-sonnet-4-6');

nodes.notes: Each extracted item becomes a PROPOSED row in the gate log. Fabian reviews via the Evening Review touchpoint.

parameters.query: UPDATE raw_transcripts SET processed = TRUE WHERE transcript_id = $1;
UPDATE extraction_run SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), items_proposed = $1 WHERE id = $2;
INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('TranscriptExtracted', 'transcript', 'plaud_extraction', jsonb_build_object('transcript_id', $1, 'items_proposed', $2));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('plaud_extraction', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Extracts structured register items from PLAUD transcripts using Claude API. Every item enters confidence_gate_log as PROPOSED. Fabian reviews during Evening Review. No auto-promotion to CONFIRMED.
